title: Consultation Report
description: Structured report every advisory role agent returns to the PM. Consultants are advisory-only: this report is their entire output.

role.description: Configured role name of the consultant that produced this report (see config/apm.yaml roles).

topic.description: The consultation question as understood, prefixed with its feature area (e.g. 'passing.lob: arc apex too high' or 'payroll.tax: multi-state withholding').

findings.description: What was learned from reading code/config and researching — facts with file/class/doc references, not opinions.

approach.description: Recommended approach, concrete enough for a developer ticket. Include rejected alternatives and why, one line each. Diagrams (Mermaid/text) go here.

files_touched.description: Repo/asset paths the recommended approach would create or modify. Empty if purely a design/process recommendation.

risks.description: Technical, scope, budget, or compliance risks — including anything that smells out-of-scope for the active version (flag for the PM's deferred protocol).

sequencing.description: Dependency ordering: what must land before this, what this unblocks, what can parallelize.

suggested_acceptance_criteria.description: Verifiable ticket criteria tied to the active spec's targets / exit criteria.

out_of_domain.description: True if this consultation was mis-routed ('this isn't my domain') — a routing bug the PM must fix.
